scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @plc-telemetry/server && npm run build --workspace @plc-telemetry/web
scripts.check: npm run check --workspace @plc-telemetry/server && npm run check --workspace @plc-telemetry/web
